description: Preload story/actor/asset pack for the next Fun Linea engine release.
safe_rating: PG-12 / family safe with mild double meanings only
notes: This pack is intentionally engine-first and content-rich; it is not a standalone plugin.
All vector assets are original simple placeholders designed for later rigging.
Audio cues are original procedural placeholders and should be replaced or refined in a later polish pass.
